title: Account page — change password form
description: Wire up the Password section on the Account page so users can update their password by providing their current password.
acceptanceCriteria: Password section has three inputs: Current Password, New Password, Confirm New Password
All inputs are of type password
New Password must be at least 8 characters
Confirm New Password must match New Password — mismatch shows 'Passwords do not match'
Wrong current password shows error 'Current password is incorrect'
Successful save shows confirmation and clears all three inputs
Save button shows loading state during API call

steps.details: Zod schema: z.object({ current_password: z.string().min(1), new_password: z.string().min(8, 'At least 8 characters'), confirm_password: z.string() }).refine(data => data.new_password === data.confirm_password, { message: 'Passwords do not match', path: ['confirm_password'] }). Render three Input type='password' fields with labels and error messages.

onSubmit: call updatePassword(current_password, new_password) from apiService. On success: reset the form (call reset() from useForm) and show 'Password updated' confirmation. On 400 error: show 'Current password is incorrect'.

Fill in all fields correctly — verify success and form resets. Try wrong current password — verify error. Try mismatched new/confirm passwords — verify 'Passwords do not match' error. Try new password shorter than 8 chars — verify validation error.

technicalNotes: Use Zod .refine() with a path pointing to confirm_password to show the mismatch error on the correct field
